headline: Why Verizon, Clorox and More Dividend Stocks Are Flashing a Buy Signal
summary: It’s the right time to jump in on dividend stocks. Clorox, Pfizer, Verizon and Comcast are some of the names to consider.

headline: Stock Of A Great Dividend King Jumps 24%
summary: While tech giants burn cash chasing AI dominance, one old-school tobacco company is quietly outpacing some of the biggest names in the market, and income investors are starting to take notice.

headline: 3 High-Yield Dividend Stocks to Buy in July
summary: The 10-year Treasury yield sits at 4.49%, in the 93rd percentile of its 12-month range. That is the number every dividend investor should keep taped to their monitor this July, because it is the hurdle any equity income name has to clear before it earns a spot in the portfolio. headline: What to Expect From Altria Group's Next Quarterly Earnings Report

headline: Altria Group: High Dividends Are Much More Addictive Than Nicotine
summary: Altria's pricing power and brand loyalty offset shipment declines, with Marlboro maintaining a 39.7% market share. Find out why MO stock is a buy.
